page.title: Runtimes
page.tagline: Machines and cloud workers running CLI sessions for your agents.
page.live_tooltip: Real-time updates · offline detection up to 75s

empty.title: No runtimes yet
empty.hint: Desktop auto-scans this computer. To use another machine — a server, dev box, or any computer with a terminal — add it here.

no_matches.title: No matches
no_matches.try_widening: Try widening the scope or clearing filters.

bootstrapping.title: Starting local runtime…
bootstrapping.hint: This usually takes a few seconds. Your daemon is registering with the workspace.

machine.no_matches_hint: No machines match the current search or filter.
machine.select_machine: Select a machine to inspect its runtimes.

online.label: Online
online.description: Heartbeat received in the last 45s. Ready to dispatch tasks.

recently_lost.label: Recently lost
recently_lost.description: Lost contact under 5 minutes ago — often a brief network blip.

offline.label: Offline
offline.description: No heartbeat for 5+ minutes. Restart the daemon or investigate the host.

about_to_gc.label: About to GC
about_to_gc.description: Offline 6+ days. Auto-deleted at 7 days unless it reconnects.

detail.delete_disabled_tooltip: This runtime is managed by a running local daemon and will re-register itself within seconds. Stop the daemon process to remove it permanently.
detail.no_agents: No agents are bound to this runtime yet.

visibility_hint.private: Only you and workspace admins can create agents on this runtime.
visibility_hint.public: Any workspace member can create agents on this runtime.

light.title: Delete Runtime?
light.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

cascade.title_one: Archive {{count}} agent and delete this Runtime?
cascade.title_other: Archive {{count}} agents and delete this Runtime?
cascade.description: Delete "{{name}}". The agents below will be archived and removed from active workflows; their queued or running tasks will be cancelled, and then the Runtime will be deleted.
cascade.warning: This is destructive. Archived agents will be removed from active workflows and their queued or running tasks will be cancelled.
cascade.notice_runtime_has_active_agents: Active agents were added since you opened this dialog. Review the new plan and confirm.
cascade.notice_runtime_delete_plan_changed: The active agent set changed while this dialog was open. Review the new plan and confirm.
cascade.checkbox_one: I understand this {{count}} agent will be archived and any queued or running tasks will be cancelled.
cascade.checkbox_other: I understand these {{count}} agents will be archived and any queued or running tasks will be cancelled.
cascade.self_healing_blocked_toast: This runtime is managed by a running local daemon and will re-register itself.

detail_page.not_found_hint: It may have been deleted or you may not have access.

connect.title: Add a computer
connect.description: Run these two commands on the computer you want to add. We'll detect it the moment the daemon comes online.
connect.step2_hint: Opens a browser to sign in, then keeps the daemon running in the background.
connect.live_listening_hint: We'll detect it as soon as the daemon starts — usually under a minute.
connect.troubleshooting: Can't open a browser on that computer?
connect.trouble_intro: Use a token instead of the browser sign-in. This replaces step 2 and works anywhere you have a terminal.
connect.trouble_token_hint_suffix: . The daemon only makes outbound connections — no inbound ports required.
connect.success_description: Your computer is online and ready. Create an agent and it can start picking up tasks here.

cloud_runtime.title: Cloud Runtime
cloud_runtime.description: Launch a managed cloud node and watch its Fleet status.
cloud_runtime.create_hint: Choose a name, instance type, and disk size. Fleet applies the rest.
cloud_runtime.nodes_failed_hint: Fleet did not return a node list.
cloud_runtime.toast_create_failed: Failed to create Cloud Runtime node
cloud_runtime.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this cloud node? This action cannot be undone.

validation.disk_size_invalid: Disk size must be a positive integer

update.managed_by_desktop_title: The CLI binary is managed by Multica Desktop — update Desktop to upgrade the CLI.

list.delete_permission_hint: Only the runtime owner and workspace admins can delete this runtime
list.delete_admin_hint: Only the runtime owner and workspace admins can delete a runtime.

usage.heatmap_caption: Last 26 weeks · daily $ intensity (period selector ignored here)
usage.empty_pricing_missing: Tokens recorded but pricing missing for:
usage.empty_pricing_hint: Set a custom rate to include them in cost totals.
usage.empty_zero_cost: Tokens recorded but cost calculation returned $0.
usage.unmapped_notice_one: {{count}} model has no maintained price — its tokens are excluded from cost totals.
usage.unmapped_notice_other: {{count}} models have no maintained price — their tokens are excluded from cost totals.

custom_pricing.title: Custom model prices
custom_pricing.description: Enter per-million-token rates so we can price models we don't ship a maintained rate for. Stored locally on this machine.
custom_pricing.empty: No models need a custom price right now.
custom_pricing.unit_hint: All rates are USD per 1M tokens. Leave every field blank to remove an override.
